name: LSASS Memory Access - Credential Dumping via Process Access
description: Detects credential dumping from LSASS memory via suspicious process access. Covers Mimikatz, procdump, comsvcs.dll MiniDump, nanodump, and direct API access to LSASS.
query: process where event.category == "process" and event.type == "access" and process.name == "lsass.exe" and not (process.executable : ("C:\\Windows\\System32\\*", "C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\Windows Defender\\*", "C:\\ProgramData\\Microsoft\\Windows Defender\\*"))
note: Alternative KQL: event.code: "10" and winlog.event_data.TargetImage: *lsass.exe and winlog.event_data.GrantedAccess: ("0x1010" or "0x1038" or "0x1fffff" or "0x1410") and not winlog.event_data.SourceImage: (C\:\\Windows\\System32\\* or C\:\\Program?Files\\Windows?Defender\\*)
